name: Medibank Private Limited
description: Medibank Private Limited is Australia's largest private health insurance provider, headquartered in Melbourne, Victoria. Founded in 1976, the company underwrites and distributes health insurance policies under the Medibank and ahm brands, serving millions of resident and nonresident customers. It operates through two primary segments: Health Insurance and Medibank Health. The company offers a comprehensive range of hospital and ancillary cover, including dental, optical, and physiotherapy services, as well as specialized health insurance products for overseas visitors and students, all dedicated to improving the health and wellbeing of individuals and families across Australia.
